children.text:
Hello gentle man, you can call me Grace.if you could take a little time to read about me, i will be very happy.

I am living in a small city in guilin, small but beautiful. Do you like water and mountains? 

I am a family woman, i like cooking for family after work. And take care of our family members.

Do you want a woman who has her own carrer while doing good at home? Then it is me!

I am open minded to embrace your culture, and i like new things.

If i am a book, i think you will be interested to read in the rest of your life.

I will like you to be who you want to be in my life, not who i want you to be in my life.

i love reading in a quitet room, with a cup of tea. there will come some special ideals in my mind, which is helpful to my job.if we can hands with hands, i think it will a wing in my paper. how romantic is it!
